name: Italian Cream Chees Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and butter together until smooth.
2. Add sugar and egg yolks to the mixture. Beat well.
3. Gradually add flour and baking soda, mixing thoroughly.
4. Stir in the buttermilk, vanilla extract, coconut, and pecans.
5. Fold in the beaten egg whites until just combined.
6. Pour batter into a greased springform pan.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25 minutes.
Frosting:
1. Cream together the cream cheese, powdered sugar, remaining butter or margarine, and vanilla extract until smooth.
2. Add any remaining chopped pecans to the frosting mixture.
